basic_details.job_title: VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Transplant Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate of any recognized system of Medicine OR Nurse OR Bachelor's degree in any subject and Preferably Master's degree in Social Work or Psychiatry or Sociology or Social Science or Public Health.
qualification.details: Graduate of any recognized system of Medicine Nurse Bachelor's degree in any subject and Preferably Master's degree in Social Work or Psychiatry or Sociology or Social Science or Public Health.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Transplant Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Transplant Coordinator Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Transplant Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Transplant Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Transplant Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate of any recognized system of Medicine OR a Nurse OR hold a Bachelor's degree in any subject. A Master's degree in Social Work, Psychiatry, Sociology, Social Science, or Public Health is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Transplant Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Transplant Coordinator position is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Transplant Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Transplant Coordinator position announced by VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Transplant Coordinator post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital for the Transplant Coordinator recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Transplant Coordinator position is a contractual job. The contract duration is specified in the important dates section.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital located?
faq.answer: VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital is located in New Delhi, Delhi. Candidates applying for the recruitment should be prepared to work in this location.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with their bio-data.
